raw_consumer_statement:
The issue is with Citibank charging me twice for a purchase of XXXX XXXX. The cost was {$2300.00} on XX/XX/XXXX. We returned the doors on XX/XX/XXXX ( we actually looked at them and never accepted them when we went to get them due to a manufacturing error ). The credit card company put the charge on twice and is refusing to correct it. Home Depot gave me all the proof needed. XXXX at Citibank XXXX ID number XXXX refused to acknowledge it was their error. Ive been going back and forth, both to them and HD with no correction over a year later. Ive been sending dispute enotes and mailing certified letters and am at a complete loss for words. Ive worked very hard for an excellent credit rating and this is going to destroy it. Please help me to resolve this. 
It is a Citibank error that needs correction.
